{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}Cano - Async Data & AI Workflows in Rust{% endblock title %} {% block description %}Cano is a high-performance async workflow orchestration engine for Rust using Finite State Machines for type-safe processing pipelines.{% endblock description %} {% block og_title %}Cano - Async Data & AI Workflows in Rust{% endblock og_title %} {% block og_description %}Type-safe async workflow engine with built-in scheduling, retry logic, and state machine semantics.{% endblock og_description %} {% block content %} {{ section.content | safe }} {% endblock content %}
